# idcloudhost_firewall (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_account_id` (Number)
- `display_name` (String)
- `rules` (Block List, Min: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules))

### Optional

- `description` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `user_id` (Number)
- `uuid` (String)
